title: XjMVVM Developer Guide
subtitle: A practical guide to learning MVVM in Xojo and building desktop line-of-business apps with PocketBase REST, SQLite, and direct database backends

parts.label: Part 1
parts.title: Learn The Concept
parts.desc: MVVM in plain Xojo language, a quick conceptual tutorial, and the framework architecture.

chapters.title: Start Here
chapters.sub: What XjMVVM is, what MVVM solves, and how to read the project

chapters.title: Quick Tutorial
chapters.sub: A ten-minute conceptual walkthrough from model to desktop screen

chapters.title: From RowSet To MVVM
chapters.sub: How direct SQL Xojo code becomes design-pattern-based framework code

chapters.title: Architecture
chapters.sub: The vertical dependency rule and the production system shape

parts.label: Part 2
parts.title: Choose A Backend
parts.desc: How the same ViewModels run against fake, local database, direct SQL, or PocketBase REST adapters.

chapters.title: Backend Options
chapters.sub: The repository adapters and when to choose each one

chapters.title: Desktop Composition
chapters.sub: The startup boundary for a Xojo desktop app

chapters.title: PocketBase Production
chapters.sub: Auth, owner rules, migrations, and REST integration

chapters.title: Direct Database
chapters.sub: SQLite and Xojo Database driver integration

parts.label: Part 3
parts.title: Ship And Extend
parts.desc: Testing, CI, docs publishing, and the pattern for building a real app on top of the framework.

chapters.title: Testing And Publishing
chapters.sub: Xojo text checks, PocketBase smokes, GitHub Actions, and GitHub Pages

chapters.title: Worked Example
chapters.sub: A conceptual Customer Desk app built the MVVM way

chapters.title: Reference Map
chapters.sub: Important files, extension points, and production-readiness checklist
